title: Old as End
description: A mod that brings a little bit more of live and diversity to the End dimension. Bringing entities, weapons, enchantments, and more
body:
This mod bring up a bit more life to the End dimension
With new creatures, weapons, tools, enchantments, blocks, achievments, foods and even more!

Compatible with better combat mod


# - New mobs:
End Mussel
End Hammer Snail
End Bee

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/m_fPGEdNjBU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# - Some of new items:
Oldend Plate
Shell Hammer

# - New enchantments:
Slam (I-IV)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/NqhHzlEhVss" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# - Some of new blocks:
Chorus Honey Block
Gravity Mucus Block
Strange Mucus Block

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-57nE9OUAv0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

pt_br and en_us support

MORE UPDATES COMING!
